atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right foot pain consistent with a Lisfranc fracture.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing right foot pain following a twisting injury during a sporting event.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports wrapping the injury with ice and ace wraps.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports taking ibuprofen.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any numbness or tingling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is concerned about the potential for long-term complications, such as foot flatness and arthritis, if surgery is not performed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals bruising of the plantar and dorsal aspects of the right foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals associated swelling of the right foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals tenderness to palpation of the midfoot of the right foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals a positive piano key test of the first and second metatarsals of the right foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The right foot is warm to the touch.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Capillary refill is less than three seconds in the right foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Dorsalis pedis pulse is strong.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Sensation is intact to light touch.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes surgical fixation of the Lisfranc fracture with plates and screws.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an MRI to assess ligamentous injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will undergo a day-surgery procedure.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Follow-up will be scheduled in one week.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a cast and crutches for follow-up.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Gradual weight-bearing will be initiated after six to eight weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical therapy to strengthen the muscles and improve function will be provided.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will receive documentation of risks associated with the procedure, including bleeding, nerve damage, and sensation loss.
